title: senecio prostratus
intro: Senecio prostratus, also known as creeping groundsel, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family native to New Zealand and eastern Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic and to reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Senecio prostratus include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Senecio prostratus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
